productDisplayName: FILA Men Trempet White Sports Shoes
description: Designed for those who enjoy those long healthy runs and walks, the Trempet from fila combines comfort and stability at its best. With a heavily meshed upper and great ergonomic construction, this is one classic running shoe. Upper Heavily meshed upper and perforations for ultimate ventilation and fresh comfort to the feet Strategically placed synthetic overlays for enhanced shoe structure Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Meshed and padded tongue and collar for snug, all-day comfort Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole Midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorption Outsole TPR outsole for durability Multi-directional grooves for absolute grip and traction on various surfaces Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
